shared_attributes.movement: right to left scrolling at Current_Speed

context.role: Ground obstacle requiring precise jump timing, tallest cactus variant
context.screen_position: spawns at x=screen_width+50px, y=0px (ground level), scrolls left
context.usage_scenario: Challenging obstacle appearing after score 200+, requires higher/more precise jump than small/medium variants

visual_specification.shape: Three vertical desert cacti of varying heights grouped together
visual_specification.details: Three cacti with varying heights (tallest reaches 100px), placed close together, each with spiky arms, combined width 102px, creates challenging tall obstacle

relationships.shared_with: Same visual style as cactus_small and cactus_medium
relationships.differences_from: cactus_small is 34x70px (single), cactus_medium is 68x70px (double), cactus_large is 102x100px (triple, tallest at 100px height)

explicit_negations: no animation or movement beyond scrolling
no gaps between the three cacti (solid group)
